briefdescription.para: Override DATARATE setting in MODE register.
Shortcut for starting encryption/decryption when the key-stream generation is complete.
End of INPTR job list before CCM data structure was read.
End of OUTPTR job list before CCM data structure was read.
Encryption did not complete in time.
CCM error status when ERROR event is generated.
Function for activating a specific CCM task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task to be activated.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of a specific CCM task register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Requested task.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified task register.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing a specific CCM event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to clear.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of a specific CCM event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be checked.
The event has been generated.
The event has not been generated.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of a specific CCM event register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Requested event.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified event register.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the specified shortcuts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Shortcuts to be enabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the specified shortcuts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Shortcuts to be disabled.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the specified shortcuts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Shortcuts to be set.
Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_ccm_int_mask_t values for bit masking.
Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_ccm_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_ccm_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling the CCM peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling the CCM peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the CCM peripheral configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the structure with configuration to be set.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the length of key-stream generated when the packet length is configured as extended.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Maximum length of the key-stream.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the MIC check result.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The MIC check passed.
The MIC check failed.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the MAC check result.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The MAC check passed.
The MAC check failed.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the error status when ERROR event is generated.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
status when the ERROR event is generated.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the pointer to the data structure holding the AES key and the CCM NONCE vector.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the data structure.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the pointer to the data structure holding the AES key and the CCM NONCE vector.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the AES key.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the AES 128-bit key value. The key shall be stored in big endian byte order.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the AES key.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the AES 128-bit key value. The key is stored in big endian byte order.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the AES nonce.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the AES 13-byte nonce value. The nonce shall be stored in big endian byte order.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the AES nonce.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the AES 13-byte nonce value. The nonce is stored in big endian byte order.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting number of bytes read from the input data, not including the job list structure.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Number of bytes read from the input data.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the input data pointer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Input data pointer.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the input data pointer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the pointer to a job list containing unencrypted CCM data structure in Encryption mode or encrypted CCM data structure in Decryption mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to a job list.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the pointer to job list containing unencrypted CCM data structure in Encryption mode or encrypted CCM data structure in Decryption mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the output data pointer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Output data pointer.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the output data pointer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the pointer to a job list containing encrypted CCM data structure in Encryption mode or decrypted CCM data structure in Decryption mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to a job list.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the pointer to a job list containing encrypted CCM data structure in Encryption mode or decrypted CCM data structure in Decryption mode.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting number of bytes available in the output data, not including the job list structure.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Number of bytes available in the output data.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the pointer to the scratch area used for temporary storage.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Pointer to the scratch area.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the pointer to the scratch area.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the data rate override value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Override value to be applied when the RATEOVERRIDE task is triggered.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting data override setting.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the CCM adata mask.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
CCM adata mask.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting bitmask for the first adata byte.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the CCM header mask.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
CCM header mask.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the bitmask for packet header (S0) before MIC generation/authentication.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the subscribe configuration for a given CCM task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to subscribe events.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the subscribe configuration for a given CCM task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the subscribe configuration for a given CCM task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task for which to read the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting the publish configuration for a given CCM event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to set the configuration.
Channel through which to publish the event.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the publish configuration for a given CCM event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to clear the configuration.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the publish configuration for a given CCM event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event for which to read the configuration.

detaileddescription.para: Presence of AES fast decrypt mode.

briefdescription.para: Presence of protocol and packet format selection.
Presence of the BLE packet format.
Presence of the packet lengh configuration.
Support for 125 Kbit radio data rate.
Support for 250 Kbit radio data rate.
Support for 500 Kbit radio data rate.
Support for 4 Mbit radio data rate.
Presence of the CCM MAC length.
Presence of the radio data rate that the CCM shall run synchronous with.
Hardware access layer for managing the AES CCM peripheral.
